text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: A real paper titled "NormTab: Improving Symbolic Reasoning in LLMs Through Tabular Data Normalization" exists, but its authors are Md Mahadi Hasan Nahid and Davood Rafiei, published in EMNLP 2024 (not 2022), at ACL Anthology URL 2024.findings-emnlp.203. The cited reference has entirely fabricated authors (Shashi Narayan, Binh Tang, Yixin Nie, etc.), a wrong year (2022 vs. 2024), a truncated title (missing "Normalization"), and the same ACL Anthology URL number applied to the wrong year — a classic grafted/hallucinated reference.
LINK: https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-emnlp.203/
